schedules.label: Nightly knowledge consolidation
schedules.description: At 4am, scans knowledge/raw/ for unprocessed sources and compiles them into knowledge/wiki/.
schedules.prompt: Run knowledge consolidation: spawn the knowledge-consolidator agent to check knowledge/raw/ for unprocessed sources, compile them into knowledge/wiki/ (summaries, concepts, connections), and update knowledge/wiki/index.md.

setup_scripts.label: Initialize knowledge directories
setup_scripts.description: Creates knowledge/raw/, knowledge/wiki/, and a starter index so the consolidator has somewhere to read and write.
setup_scripts.command:
mkdir -p knowledge/raw knowledge/wiki && [ -f knowledge/wiki/index.md ] || printf '# Knowledge wiki

Compiled from sources in knowledge/raw/ — auto-maintained by the knowledge-consolidator agent.
' > knowledge/wiki/index.md
